review: I have been using this app since April 2020 for mobile authentication and cheque deposits. In late October, I upgraded to a Google Pixel 6 phone with Android 12, which the app was not prepared for. This was resolved in mid-November. At that point, I could access the app, but it had an error every time I tried to access "Deposit Cheques". The HSBCnet tech support kept suggesting I uninstall and reinstall the app, which did nothing. I checked this morning (November 30th) and I can access the "Deposit Cheques" feature, but it keeps resulting in an error saying "Couldn't process the image as captured." My #1 complaint with the app is that it will not let the user take a picture of the cheque - it wants the app to read it and capture it automatically. This is a poor design. I would recommend that the app developers redevelop this aspect of their cheque deposit and mimic CIBC's mobile cheque deposit feature.
